optionB.text: Body cylindrical with at least posterior ventrum deeply grooved

optionA.text: First setiger appear in front of the mouth; all setae smooth

optionB.text: First setiger appear behind the mouth; some setae spinose

optionA.text: Ventral groove present in posterior part of body only

optionB.text: Ventral groove present along the whole body

optionA.text: Three body-regions, including inflated head, inflated anterior part and narrow posterior part; branchiae in posterior region only

optionB.text: Body not clearly regionated, inflated anteriorly and grooved posteriorly; branchiae from setigers 8-10, if present

optionA.text: Anal tube short, all anal cirri of similar length

optionB.text: Anal tube long, two internally attached ventral cirri present, dorsal anal cirri short

optionA.text: Branchiae, if present, along the whole body

optionB.text: Branchiae always present, limited to the posterior end of body only
